complete_end_menu.title: Cook one dish from every End food source — dragon, enderman, shulker, chorus, Endergetic (5 sources)

chorus_smoker.title: Build a dedicated End kitchen — Smoker + Brewing Stand + storage in a base built on End Stone

subtitle.text: A kitchen built in the End. Every ingredient sourced from the dimension. Every dish made here, eaten here.

description: CH.14 · THE VOID KITCHEN
▸ The End has five distinct food sources.
No Overworld ingredients required.
The kitchen can run entirely on what the dimension produces.
This is the Dungeon Meshi completion condition for the End:
to source, cook, and eat entirely from the territory.
Build the kitchen here. Cook here. Eat here.
◈ THE FIVE END FOOD SOURCES
└ 1. Dragon (End's Delight: ends_delight:)
Raw/Cooked Dragon Meat, Dragon Steak, breath-infused dishes
Unlock via: Dragon Egg Research
└ 2. Enderman (Ender's Delight: endersdelight:)
Enderman Steak, Enderman-based soups and stews
Source: kill Endermen — Ender's Delight drops raw meat
└ 3. Shulker (Ender's Delight: endersdelight:)
Shulker Soup, Shulker-based End dishes
Source: kill Shulkers in End Cities
└ 4. Chorus Fruit (vanilla: minecraft:)
Raw Chorus Fruit (teleport on eat), Popped Chorus (ingredient)
Source: Chorus Plant farm (Ch13)
└ 5. Endergetic (Endergetic Expansion: endergetic:)
Bolloom Fruit from Bolloom plants in Poise Forest
Source: Bolloom farm (Ch13 Endergetic Economy quest)
◈ END KITCHEN BUILD
└ Smoker: 2× cooking speed (End Dragon Meat + Enderman Meat)
└ Brewing Stand: Dragon Breath potions, Lingering batch
└ Chest wall: sorted by food type (dragon / enderman / chorus)
└ End Stone base + Purpur walls: fully on-theme
└ Place near Chorus farm and Enderman farm for ingredient supply
└ Ender Chest: link to Overworld supply for blaze powder/nether wart
▸ Falin's dungeon kitchen principle:
every dungeon has a supply chain if you understand the ecology.
The End's ecology is complete enough to support a full kitchen.
The dragon provides the centerpiece.
The enderman provides the everyday protein.
The shulker provides the luxury item.
The chorus provides the carbohydrate.
The Bolloom provides the fruit course.
This is a complete meal.
▶ Cook one dish from all 5 End food sources [check]
▶ Build a dedicated End kitchen on End Stone [check]
◇ Diet mod integration: End foods cover protein and fruit groups.
If your Diet balance has been protein-heavy,
Bolloom Fruit and Chorus Fruit fill the remaining groups.
A diet reset on death means re-eating after each respawn.
The End kitchen eliminates Overworld trips to rebalance.
